upload.title: Upload Your Lab test
upload.subtitle: Upload lab tests, medical reports, or ID/insurance if needed. Files must be clear and readable.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: You can change the language in your profile settings after sign in.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using the app
faq.contactText: Contact our support team for personalized assistance

q1.question: How does this app analyze my skin?
q1.answer: We use AI-assisted face analysis combined with dermatology protocols to assess your skin condition.

q2.question: How often should I scan my face?
q2.answer: Yes, you can customize your routine at any time. Go to the Routine tab and tap on any product to explore alternatives that match your skin profile.

q3.question: When will I see visible results?
q3.answer: We recommend tracking your progress weekly. Take photos in consistent lighting to see the changes over time. The app will analyze your progress and suggest adjustments as needed.

q4.question: Why do I need a lab test?
q4.answer: Don't worry! Consistency is important, but missing a day occasionally won't ruin your progress. Just resume your routine the next day as normal.

q5.question: Is my face data safe?
q5.answer: Navigate to the Profile section and select 'Doctor Review'. You can schedule a video consultation or review your skin progress with our dermatology team.

q6.question: Is my personal data secure?
q6.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team through the Emergency Support option.
